## Area To Improve

- lesson explanation
- exercise quality
- project realism
- setup guidance
- glossary or docs

## Current Problem

What feels unclear, missing, outdated, or too shallow?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the better explanation, example, or exercise you would like to see.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would help learners.
